patterns.macos_sed: Always use 'sed -i ''' for in-place edits on macOS to avoid backup issues.
patterns.pkill_before_rm: Always pkill/launchctl unload before removing binary artifacts to ensure a clean state.
patterns.tripartite_architecture: Always prioritize the Souls, Sleeves, and Jobs structure for task compartmentalization.

preferences.memory_format: Markdown for narrative, JSON for machine-indexed subconscious.
preferences.whimsy_threshold: High - include ASCII art and playful micro-copy in system messages.
